proposal_summary: This proposal requests a transfer of 7,325,000 ARB to an Oversight Committee multisig, which will delegate 7,000,000 ARB to the Event Horizon Voter Enfranchisement Pool and distribute a 325,000 ARB grant to the Event Horizon team and Oversight Committee members.

disclosed_entities.name: Oversight Committee multi-signature wallet
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: This proposal requests a transfer of 7,325,000 ARB to an Oversight Committee multisig

claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Fund the multisig for delegation and grants
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: This proposal requests a transfer of 7,325,000 ARB to an Oversight Committee multisig

claimed_complexity.reason: Involves transfer and subsequent delegation of funds
claimed_complexity.textual_evidence: will delegate 7,000,000 ARB to the Event Horizon Voter Enfranchisement Pool
